members.name: GetAdjustedTransform
members.summary: Returns the [member transform] with world scale and our reference frame applied. This is the transform used to position [XRNode3D] objects.

members.name: AngularVelocity
members.summary: The angular velocity for this pose.

members.name: HasTrackingData
members.summary: If [code]true[/code] our tracking data is up to date. If [code]false[/code] we're no longer receiving new tracking data and our state is whatever that last valid state was.

members.name: LinearVelocity
members.summary: The linear velocity of this pose.

members.name: Name
members.summary: The name of this pose. Usually, this name is derived from an action map set up by the user. Godot also suggests some pose names that [XRInterface] objects are expected to implement: - [code]root[/code] is the root location, often used for tracked objects that do not have further nodes. - [code]aim[/code] is the tip of a controller with its orientation pointing outwards, often used for raycasts. - [code]grip[/code] is the location where the user grips the controller. - [code]skeleton[/code] is the root location for a hand mesh, when using hand tracking and an animated skeleton is supplied by the XR runtime.

members.name: TrackingConfidence
members.summary: The tracking confidence for this pose, provides insight on how accurate the spatial positioning of this record is.

members.name: Transform
members.summary: The transform containing the original and transform as reported by the XR runtime.

values.name: XR_TRACKING_CONFIDENCE_HIGH
values.summary: Tracking information is considered accurate and up to date.

values.name: XR_TRACKING_CONFIDENCE_LOW
values.summary: Tracking information may be inaccurate or estimated. For example, with inside out tracking this would indicate a controller may be (partially) obscured.

values.name: XR_TRACKING_CONFIDENCE_NONE
values.summary: No tracking information is available for this pose.

constants.name: XR_TRACKING_CONFIDENCE_NONE
constants.summary: No tracking information is available for this pose.

constants.name: XR_TRACKING_CONFIDENCE_LOW
constants.summary: Tracking information may be inaccurate or estimated. For example, with inside out tracking this would indicate a controller may be (partially) obscured.

constants.name: XR_TRACKING_CONFIDENCE_HIGH
constants.summary: Tracking information is considered accurate and up to date.
